ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "tile_offset" INTEGER /* Offset value for the tile */,
  "attribute_mixing" TEXT /* Method of attribute mixing used */,
  "attributes" INTEGER /* Count of attributes within the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, field survey) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "srs" TEXT /* Spatial reference system (SRS) information */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution (e.g., 10m, 30m, etc.) */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Bounding box coordinates (minX, minY, maxX, maxY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiles" (
  "tile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile */,
  "tile_x" TEXT /* X-coordinate of the tile */,
  "tile_y" TEXT /* Y-coordinate of the tile */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the tile belongs to */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level of the tile */,
  "pixel_size" REAL /* Pixel size (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tiles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., integer, float, string, etc.) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute (e.g., degrees Celsius, meters, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, sensor) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source provider */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the data source (e.g., 10m, 30m, etc.) */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the data source (e.g., daily, monthly, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_mixing_methods" (
  "mixing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mixing method */,
  "mixing_method" TEXT /* Name of the mixing method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mixing method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the mixing method (e.g., weights, thresholds, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization, etc.) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access event (e.g., browser type, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the report (e.g., algorithms, etc.) */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)
